subtasks.description: Orchestrate multi-tool workflow: retrieve project requirements from Jira, check team availability from calendar API, schedule standup meeting, and share agenda via Slack. Generate a step-by-step tool invocation plan using the enterprise tool registry.

plan.cost_rationale: This query explicitly asks for multi-tool orchestration involving four distinct systems (Jira, Calendar API, Meeting Scheduler, Slack). The multitool_plan specialist is designed to generate a coordinated tool-call sequence from the 25-tool enterprise registry. A single mid-tier subtask is sufficient because the planner is generating the orchestration plan itself, not executing parallel data transformations. Mid tier is appropriate for sequencing dependencies (Jira → Calendar → Meeting → Slack) and handling the conditional logic of meeting availability and scheduling.
